ChemG — Chemikaliengesetz (Germany)

German chemicals act implementing REACH at national level — enforcement, penalties, and national competent authority rules.

Official source: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/chemg_2017/
(Full HTML available at gesetze-im-internet.de — fetch via national portal or DIP.)
